/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/contrib/gcc/11.4.1/bin/g++ -fPIC -lboost_program_options -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libCalibEvent.so -o ../../lib/libCalibEvent.so CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibChannel.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibChannelDict.cxx.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibEvt.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibEvtDict.cxx.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibHeader.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/CdCalibHeaderDict.cxx.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibChannel.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibChannelDict.cxx.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibEvt.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibEvtDict.cxx.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibHeader.cc.o CMakeFiles/CalibEvent.dir/src/TvtCalibHeaderDict.cxx.o   -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/Python/3.11.10/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/Boost/1.85.0/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/ROOT/6.30.08/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/CLHEP/2.4.7.1/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/HepMC/2.06.11/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/frontier/2.10.2/lib  -L/cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/nuwro/21.09.2/lib  /cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/ROOT/6.30.08/lib/libPhysics.so ../../lib/libTAOEDMUtil.so /cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/junosw/InstallArea/lib64/libEDMUtil.so /cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/junosw/InstallArea/lib64/libBaseEvent.so /cvmfs/juno.ihep.ac.cn/el9_amd64_gcc11/Release/J25.7.1/ExternalLibs/ROOT/6.30.08/lib/libCore.so
